productDisplayName: Status Quo Men's Unplugged Yellow T-shirt
description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with monochromatic faded graphic print on the front, red piping along sleeve and shirt seams and stylish stitch detailing on the back top panel and shoulder flapsWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking5. Remove promptly6. Line dry inside-out in shade7. Warm iron only8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFittingRegularIf the sound of electric guitars sets your heart racing, then bring alive that rock star in you. Wear this jamming tee from status quo and let loose your inner wild child. While the cotton fabric will keep you dry and comfortable throughout those nights of rocking to heavy metal, the stitch detailing on the shoulder flaps and top panel at the back, coupled with contrast colour piping along the sleeve and shirt ends render this tee a stylish look. Team this with jeans and a black biker jacket for a real edgy look. Add on a pair of fashionable footwear from the wide international range available at myntra to complete that style mantra.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2.
